title: Burnt Basic
body:
**Fire**

We've watched it, played with it, and shouted angrily at it in Minecraft since the early early days. But it's not great, behaves badly, takes things from us and doesn't give back… so what if it could be something better?

This is BURNT. A Vanilla fire enhancing mod, if you light it, it will burn… Not disappear… BURN. In return, wooden structures and trees remain, burnt and twisted, and with resources you can use.

Finally a good use for the flint and steel.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HEizwboHxco" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Start a FIRE**

- Light a block with flint and steel
- Fire an arrow from a FLAME enchanted bow
- Set a FIRE BARREL and stand back
- Explode a creeper with flame arrows
- Pour on some LAVA
- Lightning strikes

**Watch it BURN**

- Blocks smolder, blaze, spread, and burn
- Smoke, ember, and ash effects
- Distant smoke plumes
- Integrated WIND SYSTEM controls the direction and intensity of a fire
- Read the wind with FLAGS
- Biome aware - hot/dry burns larger than cold/wet
  
**Control the BLAZE**

- Discover or craft the fire extinguisher
- Use a wind charge to extinguish fires
- Iron golems help fight village fires
- Rain dampens the spread
- Fully CONFIGURABLE

In an emergency: **/burnt killFire**
